creator: jaap@NLnetLabs.nl
text:
Normally the port builds fine, see <https://redports.org/~jaap/20140726130308-92682-227680/opendmarc-1.2.0.log> for an example. 

With gcc48 configure breaks because it cannot find the include files for libmilter. If you reallt insist on forcing the use of gcc48, you are onyour own. I suggest reporting this to the upstream via the developers list <http://www.trusteddomain.org/mailman/listinfo/opendmarc-dev>.
